CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, content VARCHAR);
SELECT id, content, regexp_matches(content, '(an)') AS matches FROM test_strings WHERE content IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, content FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(content, '(ana|ban)');
SELECT id, content FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(content, '^a.*a$');
SELECT id, content FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(content, '(an)+');
SELECT id, content FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(content, '.*(banana).*');
SELECT t1.id, t1.content FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.id != t2.id WHERE regexp_matches(t1.content, '(an)') AND regexp_matches(t2.content, '(banana)');
SELECT id, content FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(content, '(a{2,})');
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE NOT regexp_matches(content, '(apple|banana)');
SELECT ts.id, ts.content, p.pattern, regexp_matches(ts.content, p.pattern) AS matches FROM test_strings ts CROSS JOIN patterns p;
SELECT id, content FROM test_strings WHERE content LIKE '%a%' AND regexp_matches(content, '(banana)');
SELECT a.info, regexp_matches(a.info, '(an)') FROM additional_strings a WHERE a.info LIKE '%banana%' OR regexp_matches(a.info, '(isolation)';
